title: Timer
description: Timer Data Pack - Multiple designs to choose - Toggle-able rules to freeze/secure/blind players
body:
# M-Timer & Clock Add a timer to your HUD to stop times or display the current time. You have full control over your timer with design customization or even rules like freezing/blind/secure all players on timer pause.
### **Important** This data pack was designed for simple usage in single player. If you search for a high customizable timer with even more features like custom designs with animations, automated tasks and more visit the [plugin (and soon fabric mod) version of MTimer](https://modrinth.com/plugin/timer)! ## Access & customize the Timer Some commands can be used without cheats enabled via `/trigger `. | Command | Cheat-less Command | Short Description | |:-:|:-:|:-:| | `/function timer:resume` | `/trigger resume` | Resumes your timer | | `/function timer:pause` | `/trigger pause` | Pauses your timer | | `/function timer:reset` | ❌ | Resets the current time | | `/function timer:help` | `/trigger help` | Displays a list of all commands | | `/function timer:settings` | ❌ | Customize your timer (design & rules) | ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/biXJOpKz/images/b0fa256af3f7eed52cf84662a0eeaaacd9dc952d.gif) ## Timer Designs The data pack was designed to easily support multiple designs. If you have an idea for a new unique design join our [Discord Server](https://dc.mutils.de) to suggest it!
You can try to create it on your own in our design creator of the [original MTimer](https://modrinth.com/plugin/timer). > ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/biXJOpKz/images/c292f58058caa59ac4d824400df1d82566456725.gif)
> ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/biXJOpKz/images/c8d75f4b4e3fdbe535d8de31f93487fe7cf10226.gif) ## Timer Settings MTimer currently support 3 rules to customize the experience accessible under `function timer:settings`. You can toggle... - Player invulnerability on pausing (default off)
- Blindness on pausing (default off)
- Player movement freezing (default off) ## Roadmap In 1.20.2 a new feature called *macros* releases. This will allow me to add timer animations too to the cost of performance (probably very small impact). Until then, no animations are possible in designs currently.
